base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of status_orb_gray — a ui from 1986 dragon quest. Gray status orb — inactive indicator (HP/MP readout background?). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gray status orb — inactive indicator (HP/MP readout background?); 2 variants
